name: kayleigh-li-imprivata
description: Kayleigh's Augment CLI marketplace - Production-tested plugins for autonomous workflows, code quality, knowledge capture, and more.

plugins.name: ralph-workflow
plugins.description: Autonomous specs-based development with specialized subagents for explore, plan, implement, and review phases

plugins.name: knowledge-capture
plugins.description: Basic Memory integration with session lifecycle hooks, conversation continuity, and knowledge organization

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research and investigation skills including STORM methodology, deep dives, brainstorming, and structured thinking

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git conventions, MCP enforcement, conventional commits, and commit policies

plugins.name: tdd-workflow
plugins.description: Test-driven development patterns with systematic debugging and verification

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Automatic linting with ast-grep/ruff/ty, code review patterns, desloppify health scoring, and refactoring agents

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Python development patterns including FastAPI, observability, and modern practices

plugins.name: kubernetes-dev
plugins.description: Helm charts, Argo Workflows with Hera SDK, and Kubernetes patterns

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Core development rules and skills - response style, security, documentation, parallel agents, and task management

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: Tools for managing Augment CLI itself - config management, ToolHive, skill authoring, ast-grep rules, and validation

plugins.name: observability
plugins.description: Observability patterns with Grafana and Prometheus MCP integrations for metrics, dashboards, and monitoring
